# Reporting a security issue

Please don't open a public issue if you find a security issue. You should contact us in private messages or open a private vulnerability report on the Security tab of the GitHub repository.

Contacts:
- Artem Bulgakov, [@ArtemSBulgakov](https://t.me/ArtemSBulgakov), art.bulgakov@innopolis.university
- Ruslan Belkov, [@dantetemplar](https://t.me/dantetemplar), r.belkov@innopolis.university
- Alexandr Zolotarev, [@ZolotarevAlexandr](https://t.me/ZolotarevAlexandr), a.zolotarev@innopolis.university
